test.name: TC-004 Driver Cancel Incident

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางทั้งหมด')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางทั้งหมด')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางทั้งหมด')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(),'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(),'เส้นทางของฉัน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(),'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Post Incident Report
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'แจ้งอุบัติเหตุ')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'แจ้งอุบัติเหตุ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'แจ้งอุบัติเหตุ')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select' by value ACCIDENT.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'รายการทดสอบยกเลิก: รถชนป้ายจราจร' into text field 'xpath=//textarea'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันการแจ้งเหตุ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันการแจ้งเหตุ')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: แจ้งเหตุฉุกเฉินสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.arg: รายการทดสอบยกเลิก: รถชนป้ายจราจร

kw.name: Driver Cancels The Incident Report
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกการแจ้งเหตุ')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกการแจ้งเหตุ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกการแจ้งเหตุ')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//div[contains(.,'รายการแจ้งอุบัติเหตุที่กำลังดำเนินการ')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกเคสนี้')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกเคสนี้')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยกเลิกเคสนี้')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Alert Should Be Present
kw.arg: text=คุณต้องการยกเลิกการแจ้งอุบัติเหตุนี้ใช่หรือไม่?
kw.doc: Verifies that an alert is present and by default, accepts it.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ยกเลิกการแจ้งเหตุเรียบร้อยแล้ว
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.arg: อุบัติเหตุทางถนน
รายการทดสอบยกเลิก: รถชนป้ายจราจร
kw.doc: ทำขั้นตอนกดยกเลิกตามรูปที่ 1 และจัดการ Browser Alert ตามรูปที่ 2

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ผู้ขับขี่สร้างการแจ้งเหตุใหม่ 1 รายการ แล้วทำการกดยกเลิกด้วยตัวเอง
